plan_under_test: Prevent rendered question prompt images from retaining a later standalone top-level question when the later anchor was missed by the main span detector.
expected_initial_failure: The new test fails before implementation because the prompt crop region extends into the later standalone question anchor.
what_passing_proves: A prompt region is removed or trimmed when a later foreign question anchor is detected on the same page.
The focused behavior works within the existing image-rendering test module.
what_passing_does_not_prove: It does not prove every historical PDF crop is clean.
It does not exercise mark-scheme crop boundaries.
risk_of_bad_tests: The synthetic layout could miss real PDF quirks, so later iterations should include real-PDF probes.

new_tests.purpose: Proves a crop for question 5 drops text at a later question 6 anchor even when question 6 was not in the known start list.

expected_pre_implementation_result: The new test fails because the crop region still extends into the later question anchor.
success_criteria: The focused test fails before code changes.
The focused test passes after code changes.
The full image-rendering test module passes.
